orgDesign.companyProfile: Municipal-tech company serving local authorities with a mix of connected field devices, SaaS operations software, and compliance-heavy service support focused first on illegal dumping and adjacent public-space safety.
orgDesign.operatingModel: Product teams own reusable field, evidence, workflow, and insight products while deployment and customer-success functions translate those products into repeatable municipal operating outcomes.
designPrinciples: Optimize for visible municipal outcomes, not device count or raw alert volume.
Keep compliance, evidence, and auditability embedded in the default workflow rather than as specialist afterthoughts.
Use waste enforcement as the proving wedge, then expand through reusable workflow and governance foundations.
orgDesign.staffingPrinciple: Prefer teams of roughly 6-9 FTE with explicit product ownership in areas where municipal workflows, compliance, or field reliability shape buying and retention behavior.
orgDesign.groupingPrinciple: Group teams by the reusable product surfaces that municipalities buy, operate, and expand from.
orgDesign.groupLeadershipPrinciple: Use compact group leadership with strong cross-functional product, field-ops, and staff-engineering presence rather than a large central program layer.

groups.name: Field Network and Deployment
groups.mission: Own hotspot siting, edge-device reliability, and the low-infrastructure field network that makes municipal deployment practical.

teams.name: Site Planning and Deployment
teams.mission: Own hotspot planning, deployment tooling, relocation decisions, and field rollout repeatability.

relatedKPIs: Days from deployment to first actionable case

staffing.staffingGuidance: Needs a blend of product analytics, municipal operations understanding, and deployment planning discipline.

roles.responsibility: Own hotspot-planning product strategy and rollout outcomes.
Lead delivery quality and cross-team coordination.
Guide spatial planning, deployment architecture, and long-term product fit.
Build planning, scoring, and rollout workflow services.
Build operator planning surfaces and workflows.
Bring field rollout evidence into product iteration.

teams.name: Edge Device Reliability
teams.mission: Own edge-device capture reliability, connectivity, privacy zoning, and fleet health across live municipal deployments.

relatedKPIs: Time from alert to case qualification
Days from deployment to first actionable case

staffing.staffingGuidance: Needs strong embedded, connectivity, and field-operations capability because municipal trust depends on reliable deployments.

roles.responsibility: Own field reliability, deployment speed, and installed-base health.
Lead delivery and field reliability operations.
Guide edge architecture, privacy enforcement, and fleet resilience.
Build capture, configuration, and device control software.
Build connectivity and fleet telemetry services.
Guard uptime, observability, and fleet alert quality.
Translate deployment issues into repeatable product fixes.

groups.name: Evidence, Compliance and Case Core
groups.mission: Own admissible evidence, compliance posture, case workflows, and the procedural backbone of municipal enforcement.

teams.name: Evidence Intelligence
teams.mission: Own detection, triage, evidence storage, retention, and auditability for municipal incidents.

ownedProductBricks.brickName: Evidence Vault and Chain of Custody

staffing.staffingGuidance: Needs a mix of backend, analytics, governance, and workflow engineering because output quality and legal defensibility are intertwined.

roles.responsibility: Own detection quality, evidence integrity, and triage performance.
Lead delivery quality and reliability.
Set direction for evidence architecture and governance.
Build detection, evidence, and retention services.
Improve triage quality and prioritization logic.
Own access, auditability, and compliance controls.

teams.name: Compliance and Case Core
teams.mission: Own the case workspace, procedure logic, notice generation, and governance support used to turn incidents into enforceable outcomes.

staffing.staffingGuidance: Needs deep product and workflow ownership because procedural clarity and legal defensibility directly drive retention.

roles.responsibility: Own case-core workflow and procedural quality.
Lead delivery execution and operating health.
Guide case model and procedural architecture.
Build case, procedure, and document-generation services.
Build the operator case experience.
Translate legal and GDPR operating needs into repeatable product rules.

groups.name: Municipal Operations Workflows
groups.mission: Own field dispatch, mobile execution, and the integrations that connect the platform to daily municipal work.

teams.name: Field Response Workflow
teams.mission: Own task dispatch, mobile workflow, and the operational loop from validated incident to field completion.

staffing.staffingGuidance: Needs strong workflow, mobile, and municipal-operations intuition because the product succeeds only when daily field work gets easier.

roles.responsibility: Own dispatch and field workflow outcomes.
Lead delivery and operational reliability.
Guide workflow and mobile architecture.
Build dispatch and workflow services.
Build field-facing mobile workflows.
Keep field interactions understandable in low-attention contexts.

teams.name: Municipal Integrations
teams.mission: Own the integration surfaces that connect the platform to municipal service, finance, and partner-authority systems.

staffing.staffingGuidance: Needs integration depth and partner workflow discipline because municipal ecosystem fit varies by account.

roles.responsibility: Own integration priorities and municipal ecosystem fit.
Lead connector delivery and reliability.
Guide integration architecture and data contracts.
Build APIs, connectors, and export pipelines.
Translate account-specific municipal system needs into reusable product patterns.

groups.name: Impact, Expansion and Customer Success
groups.mission: Own executive value proof, benchmark insights, and the adjacent expansion path from waste enforcement into broader municipal response workflows.

teams.name: Executive Insights
teams.mission: Own outcome analytics, executive dashboards, and benchmark views that justify renewal and expansion.

staffing.staffingGuidance: Needs strong analytics and narrative product skill because municipal renewal depends on credible proof, not raw reporting volume.

roles.responsibility: Own executive insight product strategy and renewal proof.
Lead analytics and dashboard delivery.
Build KPI pipelines, benchmark models, and reporting logic.
Build dashboard and insight experiences.
Turn municipal outcome evidence into reusable product and commercial narratives.

teams.name: Safety Expansion
teams.mission: Own the adjacent expansion path that extends the same compliant platform into municipal safety and anti-social behaviour workflows.

staffing.staffingGuidance: Needs product discovery depth and enough engineering to prove adjacent workflow reuse without fragmenting the core platform.

roles.responsibility: Own the adjacent safety opportunity and product validation.
Guard reuse of the shared platform and prevent one-off fragmentation.
Adapt shared workflow and sharing services for pilot use cases.
Translate pilot account needs into evidence-backed product bets.
Ensure the adjacent workflow inherits a defendable governance model.
